intro: Pseudogynoxys neovolcanica, also known as Pseudogynoxys neovolubilis, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress.
